mapper.select:
SELECT a.artwork_id, a.member_id, a.category_id, a.is_status, a.title, a.content, a.view_count, a.reg_dt, a.mod_dt, a.comp_dt FROM artwork a
AND a.is_status = #{isStatus}
AND ( a.is_status = 'N' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM artwork_entry e WHERE e.artwork_id = a.artwork_id) )
AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY a.artwork_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artwork a
AND a.is_status = #{isStatus}
AND ( a.is_status = 'N' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM artwork_entry e WHERE e.artwork_id = a.artwork_id) )
AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
SELECT artwork_id, member_id, category_id, is_status, title, content, view_count, reg_dt, mod_dt, comp_dt FROM artwork WHERE artwork_id = #{artworkId}
mapper.update: UPDATE artwork SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, mod_dt = SYSDATE WHERE artwork_id = #{artworkId}
UPDATE artwork SET is_status = 'Y', comp_dt = SYSDATE WHERE artwork_id = #{artworkId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.artwork_id, a.member_id, a.category_id, a.is_status, a.title, a.content, a.view_count, a.reg_dt, a.mod_dt, a.comp_dt, m.nickname, c.category_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like l WHERE l.target_type = 'ARTWORK' AND l.target_id = a.artwork_id) AS like_count FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.is_status = 'Y' ORDER BY (like_count * #{likeWeight} + a.view_count) DESC, a.artwork_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.artwork_id, a.member_id, a.category_id, a.is_status, a.title, a.content, a.view_count, a.reg_dt, a.mod_dt, a.comp_dt, m.nickname, c.category_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like l WHERE l.target_type = 'ARTWORK' AND l.target_id = a.artwork_id) AS like_count FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.is_status = 'Y' AND a.reg_dt >= SYSDATE - #{days} ORDER BY like_count DESC, a.view_count DESC, a.artwork_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.artwork_id, a.member_id, a.category_id, a.is_status, a.title, a.content, a.view_count, a.reg_dt, a.mod_dt, a.comp_dt, m.nickname, c.category_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like l WHERE l.target_type = 'ARTWORK' AND l.target_id = a.artwork_id) AS like_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.artwork_id DESC) AS rn FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id
AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND a.content LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND c.category_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND ( a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR a.content LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR c.category_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' )
) WHERE rn BETWEEN ((#{pageNo} - 1) * #{pageSize} + 1) AND (#{pageNo} * #{pageSize}) ORDER BY rn

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id
AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND a.content LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND c.category_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND ( a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR a.content LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR c.category_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' )
